title: devlane user config
description: User-editable configuration at ~/.config/devlane/config.yaml. Controls the port allocation pool and reserved ports. The whole file is optional; sensible defaults apply when it is missing.

port_range.description: Bounds the pool devlane allocates from when an adapter's declared default is unavailable. Note: start must be <= end; not enforced at the schema level.

reserved.description: Ports that devlane must never allocate, even when an adapter's declared default matches.
